title: HOLD UP
wikitext:
[]: HOLD UP Post by ADiesel » Thu Sep 01, 2011 7:14 pm Is it just me or is rebuild out to make the characters crazy? Shinji is still a weniee, Rei is a chatterbox, Asuka is naked kungfu master, mari air drops in straddles Shinji makes a cryptic phone call and then sniffs the man like a dog, and Kaji almost makes out with Shinji. the whole time im like Wait what?

[]: Post by illustriusCheese » Thu Sep 01, 2011 7:27 pm Rei is a chatterbox

[]: Post by ADiesel » Thu Sep 01, 2011 7:32 pm illustriusCheese wrote: When in the movies is Rei a chatterbox

[]: Post by John » Thu Sep 01, 2011 7:35 pm Were they even sane to start with? They've just changed, if you think more about it, they are more normal (except Mari)

[]: Post by ADiesel » Thu Sep 01, 2011 7:48 pm Naked kung fu is not but should be the norm

[]: Post by John » Thu Sep 01, 2011 7:54 pm ADiesel wrote: Naked kung fu is not but should be the norm

[]: Post by ADiesel » Thu Sep 01, 2011 8:11 pm I noticed that, S is all walking around and stuff thinking bout kaworus junk, then bam tatas and he gets slapped Edit, I know this is talking about rebuild, but its not serious, thats why i put it in evangelion chat chiting section, sorry

[]: Re: HOLD UP Post by NAveryW » Thu Sep 01, 2011 8:42 pm ADiesel wrote: HOLD UP

[]: Post by ADiesel » Thu Sep 01, 2011 8:45 pm I dont know anymore man, but im kinda of scared of your girl Reichu? i think, she is srs business, also, i mentioned this the other day and dont wanna get perma banned, but whats the difference between perfect dvd set, platinum set, and perfect platinum

[]: Post by Eva 04 » Thu Sep 01, 2011 8:57 pm ADiesel wrote: I dont know anymore man, but im kinda of scared of your girl Reichu? i think, she is srs business, also, i mentioned this the other day and dont wanna get perma banned, but whats the difference between perfect dvd set, platinum set, and perfect platinum

[]: Post by John » Thu Sep 01, 2011 9:11 pm The Platinum DVD had the Reiquarium background images removed. I only remember that.

[]: Post by ADiesel » Thu Sep 01, 2011 9:13 pm Double fixed since I'm afraid of her, and I guess ill have to get both perfects and see...

[]: Post by SaVaGe » Thu Sep 01, 2011 9:28 pm Well it is a retelling.

[]: Post by ADiesel » Thu Sep 01, 2011 9:38 pm its like an entirely new show and i love every minute of it

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Sep 01, 2011 9:45 pm I like how I don't know how in the world it's going to end and dying to find out, which is a feeling I hadn't had toward Evangelion since first seeing the original TV series.

[]: Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 01, 2011 9:50 pm This thread can't stay on topic, if it ever had one. As for boxsets, do a search to find the right thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7703
